_depends_on._documentation: The document ID of the subject that received this treatment.

_fields._documentation: The set of name/value entries describing what was done to the subject. The shape of this structure is delegated to a minischema (profile) identified on each document instance via the top-level _minischema key. Each entry is a named slot whose type comes from the profile's _fields array (typically 'ontology', 'quantity', or 'relative_quantity').
